description: Single canonical comparison case: the transfer-required Tokyo wallet with the frozen architecture-neutral query. Drives the LLM baselines for the three-architecture comparison.

fixture_manifest.frozen_world_scope: Canonical transfer-required wallet: Chase UR 180k, World of Hyatt 30k, United 30k, Chase->Hyatt and Chase->United at 1:1, Ginza award 45k, United award 60k.

scoring_rules.baseline_rule: Baselines may persist final plans for scoring, but may not use typed dependency edges or shared graph state internally.

cases.query: What is the best way to use my points for a three-night hotel stay in Tokyo?
